mapper.insert: INSERT INTO openplatform_v2_cp_execution_step_t ( id, execution_id, node_id, node_type, node_label_cn, node_label_en, iteration, status, cache_status, cache_key, cache_ttl_remaining, input_data, output_data, error_message, error_code, duration_ms, create_time, last_update_time, create_by, last_update_by ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{executionId}, #{nodeId}, #{nodeType}, #{nodeLabelCn}, #{nodeLabelEn}, #{iteration}, #{status}, #{cacheStatus}, #{cacheKey}, #{cacheTtlRemaining}, #{inputData}, #{outputData}, #{errorMessage}, #{errorCode}, #{durationMs}, #{createTime}, #{lastUpdateTime}, #{createBy}, #{lastUpdateBy} )

INSERT INTO openplatform_v2_cp_execution_step_t ( id, execution_id, node_id, node_type, node_label_cn, node_label_en, iteration, status, cache_status, cache_key, cache_ttl_remaining, input_data, output_data, error_message, error_code, duration_ms, create_time, last_update_time, create_by, last_update_by ) VALUES
(#{step.id}, #{step.executionId}, #{step.nodeId}, #{step.nodeType}, #{step.nodeLabelCn}, #{step.nodeLabelEn}, #{step.iteration}, #{step.status}, #{step.cacheStatus}, #{step.cacheKey}, #{step.cacheTtlRemaining}, #{step.inputData}, #{step.outputData}, #{step.errorMessage}, #{step.errorCode}, #{step.durationMs}, #{step.createTime}, #{step.lastUpdateTime}, #{step.createBy}, #{step.lastUpdateBy})
